channel.title: leadership on addcommitpush.io
channel.description: Recent content in leadership on addcommitpush.io

item.title: Recruiting engineers as a startup
item.description: Intro As someone who’s worked as a data lead or head of engineering for the past years, I’ve learned a lot about finding and hiring great engineers. In this post, I want to share my insights, tips and tricks, and tactics to succeed in recruiting software developers, data engineers/scientists, and other related software roles in the context of a tech startup. What will you get to read Recruitment process How I evaluate candidates How to find good candidates This blogpost is written from the perspective of a head/VP of engineering, CTO, or similar at a small startup.
